## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between RunPod and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - RunPod's SEO performance shows promise, ranking \#1 for "top serverless GPU providers" but with room for improvement in other areas
  - [New Looker Studio report built out for RunPod, showing article performance and SEO metrics](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [GrowthX onboarding new account manager to help with RunPod's content creation](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Engineering work needed (1-2 weeks) to implement framework for rent GPU cluster articles](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance and Rankings

  - RunPod ranking \#1 for "top serverless GPU providers", but on page 2 for "top cloud GPU providers"
  - [Careful wording used in articles to avoid cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Some articles not automatically indexed; manual indexing requested](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [New comparison articles coming this week: cloud GPU providers, features to look for, and 425 relevance play](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation

  - [Upcoming articles: image generation (ComfyUI, PyTorch, Stable Diffusion)](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [New account manager onboarded with technical/UX background to help with content creation](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Emmett using ChatGPT's deep research function for article optimization (30-min process, heavily SEO optimized)](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Sydney running articles through ChatGPT for natural language processing and LLM ranking](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

### Looker Studio Report

  - [New dashboard built for RunPod, showing article performance](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Filters: blog, brand, query (considering removing RunPod brand for more accurate non-branded performance)](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Metrics: impressions, CTR (needs improvement), average position](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Sydney to add conversion data once Emmett confirms desired events to track](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

### Rent GPU Cluster Articles

  - [Engineering work needed to build framework for importing these articles](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Estimated 1-2 weeks to complete](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### Image Generation for Content

  - [New image generator built by GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Potential to start adding generated images to RunPod content](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Editorial Calendar and Content Overlap

  - [Sydney noticed existing RunPod articles (e.g., Lambda alternatives)](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Request for access to RunPod's editorial calendar to avoid duplication](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Emmett to review and approve article ideas](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Emmett to discuss with team and identify correct conversion events for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Sydney to send most articles by end of day, with potential small backlog](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Continue monitoring for article cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Implement conversion tracking in Looker Studio dashboard once events are confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Sydney to explore monitoring clicks and page views through Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Emmett to provide feedback on handful of items discussed](https://fathom.video/share/puPo5GcdxRv3SJL6-Vsiuio2f48DPgXR?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
